counters.description: very hard matchup with disengage. tabis.
easy early, hard late. cannot kill without ignite. if you kill him early, the matchup becomes easy. be careful of him running you down in the lane.
you can kill her early but if you get froze at their tower, she will run you down and 2 shot. wave management and spacing is key.
very very hard matchup, check this video to learn matchup: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fdtw_h8r8bi
hard matchup, tabis could be good. fight early.
hard matchup, be careful with remount, try to ignite when demounted and pay attention to his w.
he will try to run you down, he cannot kill if you space and dodge q. farm from far level 1 and try to poke level 3. you cannot kill without ignite.
very hard matchup, you need very good spacing, you cannot kill him late game. roam and invade to get kills.
cannot kill without ignite. tabis could be worth it. be aware of level 6 1 shots if she has ignite. flash 3rd q if needed
hard matchup, you need to have amazing spacing.
she has so much push power, its a very hard matchup. you need to fight her early and get a lead pre 6.
probably your second worst matchup after warwick. tabis mandatory and try to find out if he is an aggressive trynda or a passive one. some tryndamere players are passive and should be harassed hard.
mercs and pray, your worse matchup in the game. you really need ignite and try to bait his barrier, if he goes ghost tp, its easier.
